economic_notes: Operates on-reserve Gas Bar and Convenience Store, Tim Hortons kiosk under license agreement with TDL Group Corp until 2026. 33.333% ownership interest in Shwe Miikaan Corp and Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership. COVID-19 pandemic negatively impacted operations including certain revenue streams.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 (year ended March 31, 2021). Consolidated entity includes Magnetawan Development GP Inc. and Magnetawan Development Limited Partnership. Two equity-method investments: Shwe Miikaan Corp (33.333%) and Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership (33.333%). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $2,623,102 + Health Canada $2,165 + CMHC $137,851 + Ministry of Children Community and Social Services $262,516 + Ministry of Indigenous Affairs $151,189 + Ministry of Health $142,656 + Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership $538,879 = $3,857,358. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. COVID-19 pandemic noted as ongoing risk. CMHC first advance of $481,576 has no repayment terms established yet.
